headline: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) Launched TraX Tape, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) is in focus after launching TraX Tape, a bond market data product built around real-time analytics and AI pricing, alongside reporting over US$1.04t in total credit trading volume for Q2 2026. See our latest analysis for MarketAxess Holdings. Despite the TraX Tape launch and Q2 trading update, MarketAxess Holdings’ recent momentum has been mixed, with 7-day and 1-day share price returns higher, while the 90-day share price return and 1-year total shareholder return...
